# kanidm_oauth2_basic (Data Source)

Reads a Kanidm OAuth2 basic (confidential) client.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the OAuth2 client to look up.

### Read-Only

- `allow_insecure_client_disable_pkce` (Boolean) Whether PKCE can be disabled.
- `displayname` (String) Display name.
- `jwt_legacy_crypto_enable` (Boolean) Whether legacy RS256 JWT signing is enabled.
- `origin` (String) Origin URL.
- `prefer_short_username` (Boolean) Whether short username is returned in preferred_username claim.
- `redirect_uris` (List of String) Allowed redirect URIs.
